title: Spiral Witness Tones
hypothesis: Records arranged in a temporal spiral where each text fragment carries an associated tone frequency. Long-pressing paradoxically locks a record while making its unlocked neighbors more vulnerable to text corruption. Accessing any record degrades nearby unlocked records' text. SessionStorage ensures total state erasure on tab close—true archival ephemerality where preservation is temporary and loss is guaranteed.
dataModel: Seeded text fragments arranged in concentric spiral rings via CSS transforms. Each record has: witness text string, tone frequency (Hz), corruption level (0-100), lock state (boolean), access count. Some spiral positions intentionally vacant to represent pre-loss.
recordCountStrategy: Seeded from current hour and date string, yielding 7-23 records. Hour modulo determines base count (9-17), then adds day-of-week offset (0-6). 15-25% of computed positions are randomly left vacant based on seed, ensuring variable density and absence.
interactionModel: Long-press (pointerdown 500ms) toggles lock and plays Web Audio API tone at record's frequency. Click reads record, increments access count, and triggers corruption in 2-3 nearest unlocked neighbors. Scroll/wheel zooms spiral scale. All state stored in sessionStorage—vanishes on tab close. Locking paradoxically increases corruption spread radius from that record.
stateModel: SessionStorage keys: spiral-records (array with lock state, corruption, access count), spiral-zoom (float). No persistence across sessions. Corruption accumulates within session but resets entirely on tab close. State mutation triggers DOM text node updates and CSS class changes for visual degradation feedback.
visualLanguage: Pure DOM spiral using CSS transform rotate/translate. Monospace witness text fragments. Corruption visualized as character replacement with Unicode block elements (█▓░). Lock indicator as small padlock glyph. Background of each record shifts from warm parchment (#e8dcc8) to cold ash (#c8c8c8) based on corruption level. Zoom changes perspective. No canvas, no SVG paths, no glow.
expectedStructuralChange: Introduces temporal-spiral spatial metaphor (CSS transforms, not canvas). Adds audio dimension via Web Audio API tones. Implements paradoxical protection mechanic (locking increases neighbor vulnerability). Uses sessionStorage for guaranteed ephemerality. Text corruption is character-level and visible, emphasizing textual-loss motif. Long-press interaction is structurally different from all previous drag/scrub/click patterns.
